compiled_state.title: As a gate implementer, I have a shared signal schema that all classification gates must conform to
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Define the shared gate signal interface contract that all classification gates (1a, 1b, 2a, 2b, 2c, 2d) must emit. The contract specifies the structured output schema that Story 6 (escalation math) consumes.
**Why**: Five independently-implemented gates need a common output format for Story 6 to integrate them without ad-hoc adapters. Defining the contract first enables parallel gate development with guaranteed integration compatibility.
**Scope**:
- IN: Gate signal schema definition (gate_id, triggered, signal_type [primary|modifier], evidence summary); contract documentation; schema validation helper
- OUT: Implementing any individual gate; escalation routing logic (Story 6)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, a documented gate signal schema exists that all gate stories (S1-S5) reference as their output contract
  ← Satisfies: approach requirement for gate integration
- When this story is complete, a schema validation helper confirms gate outputs conform to the contract
  ← Satisfies: approach requirement for gate integration
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic
  ← TDD Done-of-Done

comments.body: Story complete: gate signal schema contract created, validation helper implemented, all tests GREEN.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
